# s-u.in - MovieBay Cinematic Platform

Free cinematic platform offering high-quality streaming and download links for movies and TV series, featuring curated VJ Ugandan translation versions and seamless media integration.

## Key Sections

- [Home](https://s-u.in/): The dashboard showing trending movies, popular VJ translations, and newly added cinematic releases.
- [Movies](https://s-u.in/movies): Browse the full database of movies, sortable by release year, genres, VJ translation, or popularity.
- [Series](https://s-u.in/series): Browse full TV series and episodes, sortable by release year and VJ translation.
- [Originals](https://s-u.in/originals): Browse English original releases and cinematic movies.
- [Settings](https://s-u.in/settings): Personalize playback quality, language preferences, and player settings.

## Legal and Info

- [DMCA Policy](https://s-u.in/dmca): DMCA copyright notices, take-down policies, and contact channels.
- [Privacy Policy](https://s-u.in/privacy): Privacy guidelines, data usage, and user storage information.
- [Terms of Service](https://s-u.in/terms): Usage agreement, content licensing disclaimer, and platform guidelines.
